browser: Chrome headless for screenshots; in-app browser DOM/log check for console errors
checks: Intro shows Start Ladder Run and Three-Set Free Play buttons.
Ladder Run briefing hides the board until Start Level.
Ladder wrong committed move ends the run.
Free Play briefing hides the board until Start Puzzle.
Free Play wrong tap increments mistakes and keeps the puzzle active.
Free Play completes after exactly 3 solved puzzles and shows lower-is-better score.
Logic Gate Row uses output-only targets; inputs/gates/equals are disabled.
Dice Sum uses unambiguous output target behavior for total variants.
Row target accepts non-answer cell 10 in the answer row and reached phase feedback.
Mini Crossword Fill, Crossword Pair, Circuit Switch Pair, and Maze Bridge Repair render in playable states.
Puzzle lab shows targeting metadata, Free Play preview, and answer hidden/shown states.
